label: Health outcome valuations for Australian project appraisal

qaly.label: Value of a Quality-Adjusted Life Year
qaly.context: Australia has no official QALY value for CBA. The range reflects the implicit PBAC (Pharmaceutical Benefits Advisory Committee) threshold for PBS listing decisions. PBAC has never published an explicit threshold.

daly.label: Value of a Disability-Adjusted Life Year averted
daly.context: Treated symmetrically with QALY for CBA purposes

vsly.label: Value of a Statistical Life Year
vsly.context: Derived from VSL using standard life expectancy decomposition. Published by OIA.

source.publication: Best Practice Regulation Guidance Note: Value of Statistical Life; PBAC Guidelines
source.publisher: Office of Impact Analysis; Pharmaceutical Benefits Advisory Committee
source.update_frequency: VSL/VSLY annual (WPI-adjusted); QALY threshold implicit and rarely changes

caveats: PBAC threshold is implicit and inferred from listing decisions. Not an official policy value.
For regulatory impact statements (RIS), use the OIA VSLY rather than the PBAC QALY range.
Academic literature suggests the implicit PBAC threshold may be higher (up to AUD 100,000) for severe conditions.
